description: Golden set for retrieval-accuracy evaluation. Each case names a question plus what a correct retrieval should surface: expected_keywords (substrings that should appear in the retrieved excerpts) and/or expected_meetings (meeting_ids that should appear in the ranked results). This is a seed set to be expanded with corpus knowledge (the companion FedMinutes project is well suited to generating verified labels).

cases.question: Why did the Board suspend the dollar's convertibility into gold in August 1971?
cases.notes: Aug 15 1971 Board meeting on the Nixon Shock. Verified present via live query.

cases.question: How did Governors view the dollar floating against foreign currencies after August 1971?
cases.notes: Governor Brimmer's observation on the float. Verified present via live query.

cases.question: What did the Board think about removing the 25 percent gold cover against Federal Reserve notes?
cases.notes: Gold-cover repeal debate (1967-68). Vocabulary verified present via live query.

cases.question: What was the gold loan agreement with the Bank for International Settlements?
cases.notes: BIS gold loan item. Vocabulary verified present via live query.

cases.question: Did the Board consider assistance to the savings and loan industry in 1973?
cases.notes: Domain-driven probe (see README data attribution). Unverified — a genuine retrieval test.

cases.question: Was there discussion of the Federal Reserve's emergency lending powers in 1967?
cases.notes: Domain-driven probe (see README data attribution). Unverified — a genuine retrieval test.
